'''Dix''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
He was stationed on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]] during the [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Battle of Maridun]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Because he talks with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] as with a gaffer, he is probably a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 17|''Empire'' 17]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
